form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up 12th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on January 30 over 1609m, 19 len behind Moyassr with 60kg at $41. Second run from a spell 11th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on March 6 over 1609m, 5 len behind Bella Colombia with 61.5kg at $51. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 10 at Leopardstown October 19 over 1408m, in the wet; 11 len behind Skippinandajumpin carrying 56kg at $7. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 3.5 len win. Listowel September 23 over 1408m in the wet defeating Nibras Rainbow carrying 58kg at $11. Winning hope in a suitable contest.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months raced on the pace before fading 11th of 23 at Curragh on March 28 over 1408m, 17 len behind Red Charlie carrying 59kg at $21. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Cork on August 14 over 1609m, 3.5 len behind Famous Enough with 57.5kg at $29. Expecting her to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months ran last of 15 at Navan on March 30 over 1207m, on heavy track; 29 len behind Alnofoor with 63kg at $8.50. form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. First up last campaign fifth of 9 at Laytown September 4 over 1408m, 12 len behind Lohengrin carrying 65kg at $17. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. When resuming last campaign 12th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather November 27 2024 over 1609m, 8 len behind Cousin Shay carrying 56kg at $34. Not without claims.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three months. Finished off last preparation 11th of 20 at Punchestown January 11 over 3319m, 47 len behind I Started A Joke carrying 63kg at $201. form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign 11th of 18 at Naas January 29 2023 over 3156m, soft track; 30 len behind Doyen Ta Win carrying 66kg at $17. Previously first up; 12th of 18 at Limerick December 27 2022 over 3219m, 29 len behind Little Mixup carrying 73kg at $51. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 55-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on February 13 over 1609m, 10 len behind The Liffey carrying 55kg at $126. The run before that 11th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on January 23 over 1609m, 8 len behind Kitty Bear carrying 61.5kg at $67. Eight-year-old gelding who has been well held recently and it would seem that this trend is likely to continue.
